data.title: QXO expands financing to $3 billion to support B2B and digital acquisition strategy
data.description: The expanded financing gives it additional capacity to pursue deals that add both physical footprint and digital capabilities as competition intensifies across the building-products distribution market.

data.title: Honeywell launches AI in-store shopping platform with Google Cloud
data.description: The brand said it designed the platform to connect a retailer’s existing digital product data with in-store workflows rather than require new, standalone technology deployments.

data.title: Bob's Discount Furniture files for IPO
data.description: The retailer currently operates more than 200 locations across the United States. Founded in 1991, Bob's Discount Furniture describes itself as a national omnichannel retailer.

data.title: JD Sports tests agentic commerce by linking AI shopping to checkout
data.description: The retailer said the new setup allows purchases initiated inside AI environments to be completed as standard ecommerce transactions, with orders flowing through the same systems that govern pricing, availability and fulfillment across its business.

data.title: Shopify introduces open standard to enable checkout inside AI search and chat tools
data.description: Shopify said it has co-developed the Universal Commerce Protocol, an open standard created with Google, to allow AI systems to connect to merchants’ checkout flows and complete transactions within conversational interface.
